solutions.solution: (a) Each letter is coded with its left and right letters in English alphabet. As, Z 1 16 → 6 8 26 2 15 17, G A P → F H Z B O Q and 14 5 20 → 13 15 4 6 19 21, N E T → M O D F S U. Similarly, 20 15 14 5 → 19 21 14 16 13 15 4 6, T O N E → S U N P M O D F. ∴ TONE ⇒ SUNPMOOF

(b) Each letter has been coded with its left and right letters. As, 18 15 19 5 → 17 19 14 16 18 20 4 6, R O S E → Q S N P R T D F. Similarly, 14 15 4 → 13 15 14 16 3 5, N O D → M O N P C E. ∴ NOD ⇒ MONPCE

(c) how many goals scored = 5 3 9 7 ...(i), many more matches = 9 8 2 ...(ii), he scored five = 1 6 3 ...(iii). From Eqs. (i) and (ii), many = 9 ...(iv). From Eqs. (i) and (iii), scored = 3 ...(v). Using Eqs. (iv) and (v) in Eq. (i), we get goals = 5 or 7

(a) Solutions (Q. Nos 63-67): Letter 3 5 7 4 2 6 8 1 0 9, Digit/Symbol code * B E A @ F K % R M. Conditions: (i) 1st digit odd, Last digit odd - Both are coded as X; (ii) 1st digit even, Last digit even - Both are coded as $; (iii) Last digit zero - code is #. 4 8 7 6 9 2 → $ K E F M $. In place of A @, Condition (ii) is applied. ∴ 487692 ⇒ $ KEFM$
(b) 7 1 3 5 4 0 → E % * B A #. In place of R as condition (iii) is applied. ∴ 713540 ⇒ E%*BA#
(c) 7 6 5 0 8 2 → E F B R K @. No condition applied. ∴ 765082 ⇒ EFBRK@
(e) 3 6 4 8 1 9 → X F A K % X. In place of * M, Condition (i) is applied. ∴ 364819 ⇒ XFAK%X
